description: An intern needs a safer path to ask for help.

background_log_entries.note: Asked the same question in private after receiving a terse code-review response.
Noted Aditya has been quiet in team stand-ups.
Stayed online late trying to resolve a blocker independently.

activity_signals.signal: Submitted 3 pull requests but waited 2+ days to request review
No recurring 1:1 has been scheduled during Aditya's first month

pre_conversation_briefing.participant_a_sees: You are allowed to ask for clarification. Describe the specific moment you held back, and name what support would make it easier to speak up.
pre_conversation_briefing.participant_b_sees: Aditya may be interpreting brevity as a signal not to ask. Make expectations for questions explicit and create a predictable check-in.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: I noticed you've been quieter than usual. How is the internship feeling?

scripted_conversation.speaker: Aditya
scripted_conversation.message: I'm learning a lot. Sometimes I worry my questions are too basic, so I try to solve things before asking.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: You should be able to figure out the basics on your own by now.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Aditya
scripted_conversation.message: I want to, but I got stuck on the deployment issue for two days and didn't want to slow anyone down.

scripted_conversation.speaker: Priya
scripted_conversation.message: I'm sorry that landed that way. Let's make it easier: bring blockers to our Tuesday and Thursday check-ins, and message sooner if you're stuck for more than an hour.

follow_up.commitment: Priya will hold Tuesday/Thursday check-ins and Aditya will flag blockers after one hour.
follow_up.success_note: The check-ins took place and Aditya raised blockers earlier.
follow_up.stalled_note: The planned check-ins have not been consistent. Could you set the recurring times and revisit the support agreement?
